principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: Can ChatGPT find your old drafts?
Can your browser do the admin before you switch apps?
Can you still find that note from last week?
Can your browser cut down on handoffs?
